# captureRegisterToolHandler()

```ts
function captureRegisterToolHandler(server: McpServer): {
  getCallCount: () => number;
  getRegisteredToolName: () => string;
  getRegisteredToolConfig: () => unknown;
  getHandler: () => (...args: unknown[]) => unknown;
};
```

Defined in: [testing/factory/mock-coffee.factory.ts:105](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/testing/factory/mock-coffee.factory.ts#L105)

Spies on `server.registerTool` and captures the registered tool name, config, and handler.

| Parameter | Type        | Description                       |
| --------- | ----------- | --------------------------------- |
| `server`  | `McpServer` | The McpServer instance to spy on. |

{

  getRegisteredToolName: () => string;
  getRegisteredToolConfig: () => unknown;

}

## Remarks

Wraps the original `registerTool` with a Vitest spy that records each invocation.
The returned accessor functions throw if `registerTool` was never called.
